_meta.note: Verified by fact-checker + showrunner corroboration pass. Every claim has a fetched-page verbatim quote and URL. Anchor news hook (KPBSD proposal) is in-window (2026-07-08). The DEED statewide framework is verified background context (framework released Oct 2025), used honestly as the structural backbone, not as breaking news.
_meta.recency: In-window anchor: KPBSD proposal 2026-07-08 (12 days before run). Backbone context: DEED K-12 AI framework, Oct 2025.

runners_up.bycatch: NOAA AFSC YOLOv11 salmon-excluder eval. 6 verified claims, primary NOAA source. PASSED verification but NOT selected: background (Sept/Oct 2025, ~9-10 mo) and salmon+computer-vision adjacency to Carousel No.2 (2026-07-09) risks the topic-fatigue the maintainer flagged 11 days ago.
runners_up.anlc: ChatGPT flagged Alaska Native Language Center NEH grant as DEI. Extraordinary AI angle but background (~3.5 mo), core AI mechanism single-sourced to a UAF student paper, legal-resolution source (ACLS) unfetchable (403). Too thin/old to lead. Parked as a future angle if corroborated.
runners_up.gbrd: Space Force Ground Based Radar Digitization ($423M, 2 Alaska radars). REJECTED on honesty: fact-checker confirmed NONE of the primary/trade sources mention AI/ML; it is analog-to-digital radar digitization, not AI. An 'AI' deck here would fabricate the premise.

claims.text: The Kenai Peninsula Borough School District is proposing comprehensive AI policies addressing academic honesty and student data protection.
claims.verbatim_quote: The Kenai Peninsula Borough School District is proposing comprehensive AI policies addressing academic honesty and student data protection.

claims.text: The district has spent $8,300 to date on a three-year MagicSchool subscription for students and staff (an education-specific AI platform).
claims.verbatim_quote: $8,300 to date on a three-year MagicSchool subscription for students and staff

claims.text: Under the proposal, teachers would be barred from feeding student data into AI platforms not approved by the district.
claims.verbatim_quote: bar teachers from feeding student data into AI platforms not approved by the district.

claims.text: The proposed academic-honesty change defines academic honesty, outlines how AI tools can be used responsibly, and sets consequences for inappropriate use like plagiarism.
claims.verbatim_quote: defines academic honesty, outlines how AI tools can be used responsibly and sets consequences for inappropriate use of AI, like plagiarism.

claims.text: The district's AI-specific committee was established in 2025 and reviewed Alaska DEED guidelines in fall 2025.
claims.verbatim_quote: An AI-specific committee, established last year, based their framework on guidelines from the Alaska Department of Education and Early Development.

claims.text: District administrators aim to implement the new AI policies by the beginning of the new school year.
claims.verbatim_quote: aim to implement new AI policies by the beginning of the new school year

claims.text: Board member Mica VanBuskirk urged that teachers keep discretion over acceptable AI use case by case.
claims.verbatim_quote: I think it's really important that we let teachers say, 'This is acceptable in this situation,' 'It's not acceptable in this situation.'

claims.text: VanBuskirk framed the urgency of getting AI rules right now.
claims.verbatim_quote: AI is here. We're not going to - can't fight it, but I think it's really, really important right now that we carefully examine how we use it.

claims.text: Assistant Superintendent Kari Dendurent cautioned that overly strict parameters could limit needed flexibility as the policy evolves.
claims.verbatim_quote: If you are putting such strict parameters, it may really limit where we're going to be continuously changing the language.

claims.text: Alaska became the 32nd US state to release a K-12 AI education framework, titled 'Artificial Intelligence for K-12: Recommendations and Considerations for Districts.'
claims.verbatim_quote: Alaska becomes 32nd U.S. state to release K-12 AI education framework
claims.note: Framework name corroborated on the DEED site; '32nd state' + Oct release date from EdTech Innovation Hub.

claims.text: The Alaska DEED framework centers on seven guiding principles: human-centered design, fair access, transparency, oversight, security, ethical use, and cultural responsiveness.
claims.verbatim_quote: human-centered design, fair access, transparency, oversight, security, ethical use, and cultural responsiveness

claims.text: The Alaska DEED district guidance lays out a 6-step policy development process.
claims.verbatim_quote: Form a Dedicated Team; Define a Clear Vision; Establish Vetting & Procurement; Implement AI Literacy Training; Integrate Policies Locally; Plan for Continuous Review

claims.text: The DEED guidance urges a balanced, human-centered approach that augments human capabilities without replacing essential judgment or interaction.
claims.verbatim_quote: The vision should emphasize a balanced, human-centered approach that augments human capabilities without replacing essential judgment or interaction.

claims.text: The DEED vetting checklist explicitly mandates federal student-privacy compliance (FERPA and COPPA).
claims.verbatim_quote: FERPA and COPPA explicitly mandated in vetting checklist

claims.text: The DEED guidance cites that approximately 15% of students are aware of AI-generated explicit images depicting their classmates (a cited rationale for guardrails).
claims.verbatim_quote: approximately 15% of students are aware of AI-generated explicit images depicting their classmates
claims.sensitivity: HANDLE WITH CARE; sensitive subject. Use soberly if at all.

claims.text: DEED recommends allowing at least 6-8 weeks for a meaningful AI pilot evaluation.
claims.verbatim_quote: Allow at least 6-8 weeks for a meaningful pilot evaluation

claims.text: Alaska districts named as engaged in AI-policy work include Fairbanks, Mat-Su, Wrangell, and Anchorage.
claims.verbatim_quote: Districts mentioned: Fairbanks, Mat-Su, Wrangell, Anchorage
claims.note: Context for statewide reach; use lightly.
